title: Aeronautics Scoped Links
description: Removes the ability for sable levels to crosstalk between other sable sublevels and the world.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3722d583499a799059ce16603dfdc85c9fd71ae1.png)
# Sable Scoped Links

Sable Scoped Links adds Sable-aware scoping to Create redstone links.

By default, Create redstone links can communicate globally within their normal range rules, which can cause links inside Sable sub-levels to interact with links in the ordinary world or in other sub-levels. This mod changes that behavior so redstone links can be limited by their Sable sub-level context.

## Features

- Prevents Create redstone links inside one Sable sub-level from leaking into another.
- Supports configurable scoping behavior:
  - Vanilla Create behavior
  - Same sub-level only
  - Sub-level and ordinary world bridging
- Supports Ordinary links, Mobile linked controllers, and typewriters.


## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge
- Create
- Sable

## Purpose

This mod is intended for Create + Sable worlds where redstone link networks should respect moving or isolated Sable spaces instead of behaving as one shared global network.

## Credit
- The mod icon was made by [Vercte](https://modrinth.com/user/Vercte).
